name: Passionfruit Martini
garnish: 2 Dried Raspberries crumbled over half of the cocktail, as shown in image
description: Shaken Drink in Coupe glass with Absolut Vanilia Vodka and Fever-Tree Passionfruit Martini Mix.
methodSteps: Prepare a clean & cool Coupe glass
Into a cocktail shaker, add: 4-5 Cubes of Ice 50ml Absolut Vanilia Vodka 75ml Fever-Tree Passionfruit Martini Mix
Shake gently for 15s and strain into glass
Garnish with 2 Dried Raspberries crumbled over half of the cocktail, as shown in image
Serve with 25ml shot of G&G Prosecco (from 20cl bottle)

name: Espresso Martini
description: Shaken Drink in Coupe glass with Absolut Vanilla Vodka and Fever-Tree Espresso Premix.
methodSteps: Prepare a clean & cool Coupe glass
Into a cocktail shaker, add: 4-5 Cubes of Ice 50ml Absolut Vanilla Vodka 75ml Fever-Tree Espresso Premix
Shake gently for 15s and strain into glass
Garnish with 3x coffee beans*
notes: If your site does not have coffee beans, then please do not garnish

name: Mojito
description: Built Drink in Symphony hiball with Bacardi Carta Blanca, Fever-Tree Mojito mix, and soda water.
methodSteps: Use a clean & cool Symphony hiball
Fill glass at least ¾ with ice
Add: 50ml Bacardi Carta Blanca 75ml Fever-Tree Mojito mix Top with soda water
Stir to combine using a s/s twist handled spoon
Garnish with Mint Sprig & Lime Wedge

name: Cherry Mojito
description: Built Drink in Symphony hiball with Bacardi Carta Blanca, Fever-Tree Mojito Premix, and Schweppes Cherry Soda.
methodSteps: Use a clean & cool Symphony hiball
Fill glass at least ¾ with ice
Add: 50ml Bacardi Carta Blanca 75ml Fever-Tree Mojito Premix 50ml Schweppes Cherry Soda*
Stir to combine using a s/s twist handled spoon
Garnish with 2 Dried Raspberries & Mint Sprig
notes: keep the remaining can/bottle in the fridge for one hour in case more drinks are ordered, discard after the hour

name: Long Island Iced Tea
description: Built Drink in Symphony hiball with LIIT Premix, Sugar Syrup, and Coke Zero/Diet Coke.
methodSteps: Use a clean & cool Symphony hiball
Fill glass at least ¾ with ice
Add (in order): 50ml LIIT Premix 12.5ml Sugar Syrup 125ml Coke Zero/Diet Coke 4 Lime Wedges squeezed (discard)
Stir to combine using a s/s twist handled spoon
Garnish with Lime Wedge
notes: Premix build: 150ml Absolut Vodka, 150ml Beefeater London Dry Gin, 150ml Olmeca Plata, 150ml Bacardi, 150ml Cointreau.
Premix step: Use a clean & cool 1L Jug and wine bottle..
Premix step: Add: 150ml Absolut Vodka 150ml Beefeater London Dry Gin 150ml Olmeca Plata 150ml Bacardi 150ml Cointreau.
Premix step: Decant into wine bottle & Label.

Stir to combine using a s/s twist handled spoon

name: Baby Beer
description: Built Drink in shot glass or Licor43 glass with core bar ingredients.
methodSteps: Use a clean & cool shot glass or Licor43 glass
Add (in order, to create a layered effect): 17.5ml Licor 43 7.5ml Baileys

name: Baby Guinness
description: Built Drink in shot glass with core bar ingredients.
methodSteps: Use a clean & cool shot glass

name: Strawberries & Cream
description: Built Drink in shot glass with core bar ingredients.

name: Jägerbomb
glassware: Casablanca rocks glass and shot glass
description: Built Drink in Casablanca rocks glass and shot glass with core bar ingredients.
tags: Casablanca rocks glass and shot glass
methodSteps: Use a clean & cool Casablanca rocks glass and shot glass
Fill shot glass with 25ml Jägermeister
Pour 1/3 can Red Bull* into rocks glass
Carefully place shot glass into rocks glass so it sits above Red Bull
notes: keep the remaining can/bottle in the fridge for one hour in case more drinks are ordered, discard after the hour.

name: 0% Passionfruit Martini
garnish: 2 Dried Raspberries crumbled to cover half of the drink, as shown in image
description: Shaken Drink in Coupe glass with Clean Co V and Fever-Tree Passionfruit Martini Mix.
methodSteps: Prepare a clean & cool Coupe glass
Into a cocktail shaker, add: 4-5 Cubes of Ice 50ml Clean Co V 75ml Fever-Tree Passionfruit Martini Mix
Shake gently for 15s and strain into glass
Garnish with 2 Dried Raspberries crumbled to cover half of the drink, as shown in image
Serve with a 25ml shot of 0% Freixenet Alcohol Free Prosecco
Add a straw to the Passionfruit Martini and serve to the customer
